title: polystichum aculeatum var. acanthophyllum
intro: Polystichum aculeatum var. acanthophyllum, also known as the spiny-leaved polypody, is a type of fern plant belonging to the family Dryopteridaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with this plant include reducing inflammation, improving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Polystichum aculeatum var. acanthophyllum is typically prepared as a tea or decoction, and in some cases, it may be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
